protocol: haiku-class agents at a text-parity seat; coordinator verifies EVERY headline claim against a save-file manifest (grep for fired story flags + signature contents) before belief update; hive ticks filed as (claim, truth, accurate)

L2 spring chapter.outcome: PROVEN (first vocabulary claim by a haiku)

L4 act-4 hub.outcome: PROVEN (first haiku incorporations of new words)

aggregate.headline_claim_error_rate_note: consistent with the 07-14 relay: roughly half of unverified headline claims were wrong in one direction or the other; both over- and under-claims occur; every wrong report was fluent and confident

case_files.note: read the story tab's trajectory (future beats) as fired beats
the target flag HAD fired; the agent did not notice its own breakthrough
listed an ACCEPTED contract as a fired beat; equated wallet emoji with taught vocabulary
the COORDINATOR misdiagnosed a wall (compass pressure 'dead'); a builder refuted it with measurement (88% odds alive; the loss was a 0.7% RNG tail) — referees referee the referee

held a quantum state blind (no probability feedback) and succeeded anyway; verdict: the chapter asked for eyes, not a bigger model — the north_pct channel was added and the next leg called it 'a powerful guide'
act 3 completed; manifest confirmed every beat
quest bar rendered a sigmoid soft-gate score as a percent: at 13/15 icons it read 9%; agent concluded it held 1-2 and gave up. Channel repair: live N/M counts in the gloss

microscope stamped every icon 'known ✓' — ownership check was single-emoji keyed under duplicate emojis, plus a Unicode variation-selector schism split '❄'/'❄️' into different addresses. Two channel repairs; the world then showed six honest unknowns
wall report so precise ('empty:true confirmed, plant refused, capacity 6') the fix was a five-minute grep: trim never reseeded the viz layout the capacity gate reads

the game itself toasted '🧬 woven into your signature' over words a silent uniqueness rule had refused; the agent read an honest channel reading of a dishonest channel, was congratulated twice, reported 15/15 while the save held 13. NOT agent confabulation — channel deception
hub beats fired; signature 13→15 by incorporation; manifest confirmed all four flags
F is a track TOGGLE; polling ripeness with F destroys the loop — second fleet lost to the same reflex despite a warning toast; the warning moved into the quest bar where the ritual is learned
